div.h2: One Compression Round — T1, T2, and Variable Rotation

div.p: ⚠️ Critical Order: T1 and T2 computed FIRST (using old a..h), THEN all 8 assignments execute. C evaluates RHS before LHS — no read-after-write hazard in canonical order. ❌ Common bug: e = d + T1 + T2 (T2 must NOT be added to e) ❌ Common bug: a = T2 (T1 must be included in a) ❌ Common bug: reordering assignments (b=a must use OLD a)

text.tspan: (e AND f) XOR (NOT e AND g)
T1 = h + Σ1(e) + Ch(e,f,g) + K[t] + W[t]
(a AND b) XOR (a AND c) XOR (b AND c)
